main.title: plyr.fm Private Media
main.detail: An artist-owned permissioned-data space for private audio. Granting plyr.fm access lets it read and sync the WHOLE space (every record and blob in it), so this space is kept narrow: it holds only private media records. Records reuse the fm.plyr.track lexicon; the audio blob lives in the artist's permissioned repo on their PDS, not in public storage.
